title: Origins Immersion: Enderian
description: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with more Ender-y hearts and a Chorus Fruit food bar to better fit the Enderian origin in the Origins mod. I am not formally associated with the mod or modmaker(s).
body: A resource pack that replaces the normal hearts with more Ender-y hearts and a Chorus Fruit food bar to better fit the Enderian origin in the Origins mod. I am not formally associated with the mod or modmaker(s).
